creator: pabelanger@gmail.com
text:
Beech,

devel/libevent is in fact installed. See below:

# pkg_info
libevent-1.3e       Provides an API to execute callback functions on certain ev
perl-5.8.8_1        Practical Extraction and Report Language
portaudit-0.5.12    Checks installed ports against a list of security vulnerabi
squid-3.0.1         HTTP Caching Proxy

As you can see, this is a fresh install (minimal) of 6.3.

Still cannot get port to build, same errors as posted.
